next_focus: Production is technically available. TASK-MAR-005 is complete: the guarded smoke runner verified finished-participant NPS create and update on one synthetic participant while analytics, public winners, and notifications remained clean. Continue read-only readiness/journey monitoring and avoid mutating smoke unless a specific launch-risk proof is needed.
follow_ups: Use a unique image tag or no-cache build when deploying uncommitted remote changes; reusing the git short SHA tag can leave Kubernetes on stale image content.
